Grades Calculator (Point-based)

Use this page as a fun, optional morale booster in Brightspace.

How to use in Brightspace

  1. Go to Content in your course
  2. Select Create New → HTML Document
  3. Open Source (</>)
  4. Copy the HTML below and paste it

Preview

Points Grade Calculator

Enter earned/possible points. Blank rows are ignored. Great for 1,000+ point courses.

Quick Total (Optional)

If you fill the totals above, the category table below is optional. If you fill both, totals will be used.

Category Points (Optional)

Category Earned Possible Notes (optional)

Leave rows blank if your course doesn’t use them.

Target Grade (Optional)

If you enter both fields, we’ll estimate how many total points you need overall.

Enter points and click Calculate.

Note: This is an estimate tool for planning. Always follow your instructor’s official gradebook.

Copy HTML

Copy everything below:


<section aria-label="Points Grade Calculator"
  style="max-width:860px;margin:0 auto;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#313131;line-height:1.45;">

  <div style="border:1px solid #e6e6e6;border-radius:16px;padding:16px;background:#fff;">
    <header style="border-left:8px solid #cb4900;background:#fff7f0;padding:12px 14px;border-radius:12px;">
      <h2 style="margin:0 0 4px 0;color:#cb4900;font-size:1.15rem;">Points Grade Calculator</h2>
      <p style="margin:0;color:#4c4a4f;font-size:.95rem;">
        Enter earned/possible points. Blank rows are ignored. Great for 1,000+ point courses.
      </p>
    </header>

    
    <section style="margin-top:14px;">
      <h3 style="margin:0 0 8px 0;font-size:1.05rem;">Quick Total (Optional)</h3>
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(240px,1fr));gap:10px;">
        <label style="display:block;">
          <span style="font-weight:800;">Total Earned Points</span>
          <input id="totalEarned" type="number" min="0" placeholder="e.g., 742"
            style="width:100%;margin-top:6px;padding:10px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:12px;">
        </label>

        <label style="display:block;">
          <span style="font-weight:800;">Total Possible Points</span>
          <input id="totalPossible" type="number" min="0" placeholder="e.g., 900"
            style="width:100%;margin-top:6px;padding:10px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:12px;">
        </label>
      </div>
      <p style="margin:10px 0 0 0;color:#4c4a4f;font-size:.9rem;">
        If you fill the totals above, the category table below is optional. If you fill both, totals will be used.
      </p>
    </section>

    
    <section style="margin-top:16px;">
      <h3 style="margin:0 0 8px 0;font-size:1.05rem;">Category Points (Optional)</h3>

      <div style="overflow:auto;border:1px solid #e6e6e6;border-radius:14px;">
        <table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;min-width:700px;">
          <thead>
            <tr style="background:#f7f7f7;text-align:left;color:#4c4a4f;">
              <th style="padding:10px 12px;">Category</th>
              <th style="padding:10px 12px;">Earned</th>
              <th style="padding:10px 12px;">Possible</th>
              <th style="padding:10px 12px;">Notes (optional)</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            
            <tr>
              <td style="padding:10px 12px;border-top:1px solid #eee;"><input id="c1name" value="Assignments" style="width:100%;padding:8px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:10px;"></td>
              <td style="padding:10px 12px;border-top:1px solid #eee;"><input id="c1e" type="number" min="0" placeholder="e.g., 180" style="width:100%;padding:8px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:10px;"></td>
              <td style="padding:10px 12px;border-top:1px solid #eee;"><input id="c1p" type="number" min="0" placeholder="e.g., 200" style="width:100%;padding:8px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:10px;"></td>
              <td style="padding:10px 12px;border-top:1px solid #eee;"><input id="c1n" placeholder="Optional" style="width:100%;padding:8px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:10px;"></td>
            </tr>

            <tr>
              <td style="padding:10px 12px;border-top:1px solid #eee;"><input id="c2name" value="Quizzes" style="width:100%;padding:8px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:10px;"></td>
              <td style="padding:10px 12px;border-top:1px solid #eee;"><input id="c2e" type="number" min="0" placeholder="e.g., 85" style="width:100%;padding:8px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:10px;"></td>
              <td style="padding:10px 12px;border-top:1px solid #eee;"><input id="c2p" type="number" min="0" placeholder="e.g., 100" style="width:100%;padding:8px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:10px;"></td>
              <td style="padding:10px 12px;border-top:1px solid #eee;"><input id="c2n" placeholder="Optional" style="width:100%;padding:8px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:10px;"></td>
            </tr>

            <tr>
              <td style="padding:10px 12px;border-top:1px solid #eee;"><input id="c3name" value="Labs" style="width:100%;padding:8px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:10px;"></td>
              <td style="padding:10px 12px;border-top:1px solid #eee;"><input id="c3e" type="number" min="0" placeholder="e.g., 120" style="width:100%;padding:8px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:10px;"></td>
              <td style="padding:10px 12px;border-top:1px solid #eee;"><input id="c3p" type="number" min="0" placeholder="e.g., 150" style="width:100%;padding:8px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:１０ｐｘ;"></td>
              <td style="padding:10px 12px;border-top:1px solid #eee;"><input id="c3n" placeholder="Optional" style="width:100%;padding:8px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:10px;"></td>
            </tr>

            <tr>
              <td style="padding:10px 12px;border-top:1px solid #eee;"><input id="c5name" value="Midterm" style="width:100%;padding:8px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:10px;"></td>
              <td style="padding:10px 12px;border-top:1px solid #eee;"><input id="c5e" type="number" min="0" placeholder="e.g., 90" style="width:100%;padding:8px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:10px;"></td>
              <td style="padding:10px 12px;border-top:1px solid #eee;"><input id="c5p" type="number" min="0" placeholder="e.g., 100" style="width:100%;padding:8px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:10px;"></td>
              <td style="padding:10px 12px;border-top:1px solid #eee;"><input id="c5n" placeholder="Optional" style="width:100%;padding:8px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:10px;"></td>
            </tr>

            <tr>
              <td style="padding:10px 12px;border-top:1px solid #eee;"><input id="c6name" value="Final" style="width:100%;padding:8px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:10px;"></td>
              <td style="padding:10px 12px;border-top:1px solid #eee;"><input id="c6e" type="number" min="0" placeholder="e.g., 88" style="width:100%;padding:8px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:10px;"></td>
              <td style="padding:10px 12px;border-top:1px solid #eee;"><input id="c6p" type="number" min="0" placeholder="e.g., 100" style="width:100%;padding:8px;border:１０ｐｘ;"></td>
              <td style="padding:10px 12px;border-top:1px solid #eee;"><input id="c6n" placeholder="Optional" style="width:100%;padding:8px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:10px;"></td>
            </tr>
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>

      <p style="margin:10px 0 0 0;color:#4c4a4f;font-size:.9rem;">
        Leave rows blank if your course doesn’t use them.
      </p>
    </section>

    
    <section style="margin-top:16px;">
      <h3 style="margin:0 0 8px 0;font-size:1.05rem;">Target Grade (Optional)</h3>
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(240px,1fr));gap:10px;">
        <label style="display:block;">
          <span style="font-weight:800;">Target Percent</span>
          <input id="targetPercent" type="number" min="0" max="100" placeholder="e.g., 90"
            style="width:100%;margin-top:6px;padding:10px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:12px;">
        </label>

        <label style="display:block;">
          <span style="font-weight:800;">Course Total Possible Points (for target)</span>
          <input id="courseTotalPossible" type="number" min="0" placeholder="e.g., 1000"
            style="width:100%;margin-top:6px;padding:10px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:12px;">
        </label>
      </div>
      <p style="margin:10px 0 0 0;color:#4c4a4f;font-size:.9rem;">
        If you enter both fields, we’ll estimate how many total points you need overall.
      </p>
    </section>

    
    <section style="margin-top:14px;display:flex;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <button id="calcPts" type="button"
        style="cursor:pointer;border:1px solid #cb4900;background:#cb4900;color:#fff;
               padding:10px 14px;border-radius:12px;font-weight:900;">
        Calculate
      </button>

      <button id="resetPts" type="button"
        style="cursor:pointer;border:1px solid #cb4900;background:#fff;color:#cb4900;
               padding:10px 14px;border-radius:12px;font-weight:900;">
        Reset
      </button>
    </section>

    <section style="margin-top:14px;">
      <div id="ptsResult"
        style="border:1px solid #e6e6e6;border-radius:14px;padding:12px;background:#fff;">
        <p style="margin:0;color:#4c4a4f;">Enter points and click <strong>Calculate</strong>.</p>
      </div>
      <div id="ptsBreakdown" style="margin-top:10px;"></div>
      <p style="margin-top:10px;color:#4c4a4f;font-size:.85rem;">
        Note: This is an estimate tool for planning. Always follow your instructor’s official gradebook.
      </p>
    </section>
  </div>

  <script>
    (function () {
      const $ = (id) => document.getElementById(id);
      const calcBtn = $("calcPts");
      const resetBtn = $("resetPts");
      const resultBox = $("ptsResult");
      const breakdownBox = $("ptsBreakdown");

      function numOrNull(v) {
        if (v === "" || v === null || v === undefined) return null;
        const n = Number(v);
        return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : null;
      }
      function clampMin(n, min){ return Math.max(min, n); }
      function fmt(n){ return (Math.round(n * 100) / 100).toFixed(2); }

      function getRow(i){
        const name = ($("c"+i+"name")?.value || "").trim();
        const earned = numOrNull($("c"+i+"e")?.value);
        const possible = numOrNull($("c"+i+"p")?.value);
        const note = ($("c"+i+"n")?.value || "").trim();
        return { name, earned, possible, note };
      }

      function calculate(){
        // Prefer quick totals if provided
        const totalEarned = numOrNull($("totalEarned").value);
        const totalPossible = numOrNull($("totalPossible").value);

        let earnedSum = 0;
        let possibleSum = 0;
        let usedTotals = false;

        const rows = [];
        for(let i=1;i<=6;i++){
          const r = getRow(i);
          const hasPoints = (r.earned !== null) || (r.possible !== null);
          if (!hasPoints) continue;

          if (r.earned === null || r.possible === null) {
            // ignore partial row
            continue;
          }
          if (r.possible <= 0) continue;

          rows.push(r);
          earnedSum += clampMin(r.earned, 0);
          possibleSum += clampMin(r.possible, 0);
        }

        if (totalEarned !== null && totalPossible !== null && totalPossible > 0) {
          earnedSum = clampMin(totalEarned, 0);
          possibleSum = clampMin(totalPossible, 0);
          usedTotals = true;
        }

        if (possibleSum <= 0) {
          resultBox.innerHTML = '
Please enter earned and possible points (either totals or at least one complete category row).
';
          breakdownBox.innerHTML = "";
          return;
        }

        const percent = (earnedSum / possibleSum) * 100;

        // Target helper
        const targetPercent = numOrNull($("targetPercent").value);
        const courseTotalPossible = numOrNull($("courseTotalPossible").value);

        let targetHtml = "";
        if (targetPercent !== null && courseTotalPossible !== null && courseTotalPossible > 0) {
          const neededTotalPoints = (clampMin(targetPercent,0) / 100) * courseTotalPossible;
          const pointsStillNeeded = Math.max(0, neededTotalPoints - earnedSum);
          targetHtml = `
            <div style="margin-top:8px;color:#4c4a4f;">
              To reach <strong>${fmt(targetPercent)}%</strong> in a <strong>${fmt(courseTotalPossible)}</strong>-point course,
              you need about <strong>${fmt(neededTotalPoints)}</strong> total points.
              That’s <strong>${fmt(pointsStillNeeded)}</strong> more points from here.
            </div>
          `;
        }

        resultBox.innerHTML = `
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:baseline;">
            <p style="margin:0;font-weight:900;font-size:1.2rem;color:#313131;">
              Current Estimate: <span style="color:#cb4900;">${fmt(percent)}%</span>
            </p>
            <p style="margin:0;color:#4c4a4f;font-size:.9rem;">
              ${usedTotals ? "Using totals" : "Using category sums"} · Earned ${fmt(earnedSum)} / ${fmt(possibleSum)} pts
            </p>
          </div>
          ${targetHtml}
        `;

        // Breakdown
        if (!usedTotals && rows.length > 0) {
          const trs = rows.map(r => {
            const rowPct = (r.earned / r.possible) * 100;
            return `
              <tr>
                <td style="padding:10px;border-top:1px solid #eee;"><strong>${r.name || "Category"}</strong></td>
                <td style="padding:10px;border-top:1px solid #eee;">${fmt(r.earned)}</td>
                <td style="padding:10px;border-top:1px solid #eee;">${fmt(r.possible)}</td>
                <td style="padding:10px;border-top:1px solid #eee;">${fmt(rowPct)}%</td>
                <td style="padding:10px;border-top:1px solid #eee;color:#4c4a4f;">${r.note || ""}</td>
              </tr>
            `;
          }).join("");

          breakdownBox.innerHTML = `
            <div style="border:1px solid #e6e6e6;border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;">
              <div style="padding:10px 12px;background:#f7f7f7;color:#4c4a4f;font-size:.95rem;">
                Category Breakdown
              </div>
              <div style="overflow:auto;">
                <table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;min-width:720px;">
                  <thead>
                    <tr style="text-align:left;background:#fff;">
                      <th style="padding:10px;border-top:1px solid #eee;">Category</th>
                      <th style="padding:10px;border-top:1px solid #eee;">Earned</th>
                      <th style="padding:10px;border-top:1px solid #eee;">Possible</th>
                      <th style="padding:10px;border-top:1px solid #eee;">Percent</th>
                      <th style="padding:10px;border-top:1px solid #eee;">Notes</th>
                    </tr>
                  </thead>
                  <tbody>${trs}</tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>
          `;
        } else {
          breakdownBox.innerHTML = "";
        }
      }

      function resetAll(){
        ["totalEarned","totalPossible","targetPercent","courseTotalPossible"].forEach(id => $(id).value = "");
        for(let i=1;i<=6;i++){
          $("c"+i+"e").value = "";
          $("c"+i+"p").value = "";
          $("c"+i+"n").value = "";
          // leave names as default labels
        }
        resultBox.innerHTML = '
Enter points and click Calculate.
';
        breakdownBox.innerHTML = "";
      }

      calcBtn.addEventListener("click", calculate);
      resetBtn.addEventListener("click", resetAll);
    })();
  </script>
</section>

← Back to catalog
